dashboard.compPlanDesc: Unawain kung paano ka kumikita — 5 pinagkakakitaan, 95% ibinabayad sa miyembro
dashboard.analyticsDesc: I-track ang kita, referral, at performance ng kampanya sa real time
dashboard.myNetworkDesc: Panoorin ang team mo na lumalaki — i-track ang referral, antas, at aktibidad
dashboard.noRecentActivity: Wala pang aktibidad. Ibahagi ang link mo para magsimulang kumita!
dashboard.goalShareLink: Ibahagi ang link para sa unang komisyon
dashboard.goalShareLinkDesc: Bawat Basic referral ay kumikita ng ${{commission}}/buwan. {{needed}} referral lang at ang ${{cost}} membership mo ay mababayaran.
dashboard.goal1MoreReferral: 1 referral pa at mababayaran na ang membership
dashboard.goal1MoreDesc: Mayroon kang {{refs}} referral na kumikita ng ${{earning}}/buwan. Isa pa at ang ${{cost}} membership ay covered na.
dashboard.goalNMoreDesc: Mayroon kang {{refs}} referral na kumikita ng ${{earning}}/buwan. {{remaining}} pa at libreng membership.
dashboard.goalEarningMonth: Kumikita ka ng ${{monthly}}/buwan — susunod na target: 10 referral
dashboard.goalEarningMonthDesc: Nabayaran na ang membership, tubo ng ${{profit}}/buwan. Abutin ang 10 referral para sa ${{target}}/buwan.
dashboard.goalGridDesc: Ang {{tierName}} grid mo ay may {{filled}}/{{total}} posisyon. {{remaining}} pa para ma-unlock ang bonus.
dashboard.goalWithdrawDesc: Ang affiliate wallet mo ay may ${{balance}}. Minimum withdrawal $10.
dashboard.goalOneMoreComm: Isang komisyon pa at okay na.
dashboard.goalWatchCompleteDesc: Napanood mo na ang lahat ng {{required}} video ngayon. Qualified ka sa withdrawal. Ire-reset sa hating-gabi.
dashboard.goalWatchNotStarted: Hindi mo pa napapanood ang mga video ngayon
dashboard.goalWatchNowDesc: Kumpletuhin ang araw-araw na panonood para manatiling qualified. Kailangan ng {{required}} video ngayon.
dashboard.goalStartWatchingDesc: Panoorin ang araw-araw na mga video para mapanatili ang karapatang mag-withdraw.

network.title: My Network & Earnings
network.subtitle: Your referrals, team, and commission history
network.shareYourLink: Share your referral link to start building your network
network.commissionsAppear: Commissions appear here as your network grows

compPlan.title: Compensation Plan
compPlan.subtitle: 4 income streams from one platform
compPlan.heroDesc: Click any income stream below to explore how it works
compPlan.memKey1: Paid instantly on every signup — no minimum requirements
compPlan.memKey2: Recurring monthly as long as your referral stays active
compPlan.memKey3: Annual referrals pay a big one-time commission upfront
compPlan.memKey4: No campaign tier required — earn from day one
compPlan.memKey5: Commissions go to your Affiliate Wallet — withdraw anytime
compPlan.gridKey1: Activate a Campaign Tier to enter the 8×8 Income Grid (64 positions)
compPlan.gridKey2: Your referrals and their referrals fill your grid positions
compPlan.gridKey3: Positions fill in order — Level 1 first, then Level 2, and so on through all 8 levels. This is what creates the auto-place effect as your team grows
compPlan.gridKey4: When all 64 positions fill, you earn the completion bonus and a new grid starts (advance)
compPlan.gridKey5: Higher tiers unlock more daily campaign views and bigger bonuses
compPlan.gridKey6: Grid earnings go to your Campaign Wallet — requires active tier + daily watch quota
compPlan.gridKey7: 5% of each tier purchase goes to the company — 95% is paid to members
compPlan.moneyBreakdown: 50% covers AI service costs (video, image, music, voice generation), 15% covers platform management, and 35% is paid out as member commissions (15% direct + 10% auto-place + 10% completion bonus).
compPlan.perPositionNote: Per-position earnings — you earn this amount each time a slot fills
compPlan.calcDesc: See what you could earn based on your scenario
compPlan.buyAll8: This is for one nexus. Buy all 8 packs to have 8 nexuses earning simultaneously.
compPlan.nexusKey1: Each credit pack has its own independent 3×3 nexus (39 positions)
compPlan.nexusKey2: Buy a pack → get AI credits + enter your sponsor's nexus
compPlan.nexusKey3: Positions fill left to right, top to bottom — Level 1 fills first (3 slots), then Level 2 (9 slots), then Level 3 (27 slots). This is what creates the auto-place effect
compPlan.nexusKey4: Commission = 15% if you recruited them, 10% if auto-placed
compPlan.nexusKey5: When all 39 positions fill, you earn a 10% completion bonus and a new nexus starts
compPlan.nexusKey6: 65% of credit pack cost covers AI services and platform management
compPlan.nexusKey7: Commissions go to your Affiliate Wallet — always withdrawable
compPlan.courseKey1: Create and sell digital courses on the SuperAdPro marketplace
compPlan.courseKey2: Keep 100% of your first sale — no platform cut
compPlan.courseKey3: Subsequent sales pass up to your sponsor in a cascade system
compPlan.courseKey4: The deeper your network, the more pass-ups flow to you
compPlan.courseKey6: This feature is coming soon — stay tuned for the launch
compPlan.repurchaseSubtitle: Why you don't need thousands of recruits
compPlan.repurchaseDesc: Traditional network marketing requires you to constantly recruit new people. SuperAdPro is different — your income is driven by repeat purchases from the same team members.
compPlan.campaignTiersRepDesc: Members buy a campaign tier to get video views delivered. When their views are used up, they repurchase to get more. Every repurchase fills new positions in your grid and pays you commissions again.
compPlan.creditPacksRepDesc: Members buy credits to create AI videos, images, and music. When credits run out, they buy more. Every repurchase fills new positions in your nexus and pays you commissions again.
compPlan.repStep1: You recruit 3 people — that's all you need
compPlan.repStep2: They use AI credits and campaign views as part of their marketing
compPlan.repStep3: When they run out, they repurchase — your nexus and grid fill again
compPlan.repStep4: When your nexus hits 39/39, it advances and a new one starts
compPlan.repStep5: The same 39 people repurchasing fills your next nexus automatically
compPlan.repStep6: Small team + repeat business = sustainable recurring income
compPlan.twoWallets: Two Wallets — How Earnings Are Paid

wallet.title: ◎ Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Ang iyong balanse, komisyon, at mga withdrawal
wallet.earnedFromReferralCredits: Kinita mula sa paggamit ng referral credits
wallet.affiliateWalletDesc: Mga referral ng membership, komisyon ng Studio sponsor, benta ng kurso, Pay It Forward.
wallet.requiresActiveTier: Kailangan ng aktibong antas + araw-araw na video
wallet.campaignWalletDesc: Grid komisyon: 40% direktang sponsor, 6.25% uni-level, bonus sa pagkumpleto.
wallet.campaignFeeNote: Min $10 · Bayad $1.00 · Aktibong antas + quota ng panonood kailangan
wallet.noCampaignEarnings: Walang kita sa kampanya. Mag-activate ng antas para magsimula.
wallet.referAndActivate: Mag-refer ng miyembro at i-activate ang grid para magsimulang kumita.
wallet.graceWarning: Hindi sapat ang balanse — mag-top up sa $20 USDT.
wallet.renewalAutoDeducted: $20 pag-renew ay automatic na ibabawas. Basta may laman ang wallet, aktibo ang membership.
wallet.sendFundsDesc: Mag-transfer ng USDT sa kahit na sinong aktibong miyembro gamit ang kanilang ID (hal. SAP-00042). Instant at libre.
wallet.notePlaceholder: hal. Regalo ng membership, hatian ng komisyon...

watch.title: Manood para Kumita
watch.watchedAllAvailable: Napanood mo na ang lahat ng {{watched}} video pero ang daily quota ay {{limit}}. Bumalik mamaya.
watch.watchedAllRequired: Napanood mo na ang lahat ng {{count}} na kailangang video. Qualified ang iyong komisyon. Bumalik bukas!
watch.topEarners: Ang mga pinakamahusay ay hindi nagmimiss.
watch.checkBackSoon: Bumalik kaagad — may mga kampanya kapag nag-activate ang mga advertiser.
watch.watchedOfToday: Napanood mo {{watched}}/{{limit}} video ngayon. Qualified ka sa withdrawal.
watch.missedDays: Nakamiss ka ng {{count}} araw. Kumpletuhin ang quota para protektahan ang kita.
watch.statusPaused: ⏸ Naka-pause — bumalik sa tab na ito
watch.watchInstructions: Kailangang panoorin ang video ng 30 segundo habang aktibo ang tab. Kumpletuhin ang {{limit}} bawat araw para manatiling qualified.
watch.returnToTab: Bumalik sa tab na ito para magpatuloy

upgrade.couldNotStart: Hindi masimulan ang pagbayad. Subukan ulit.

upgrade.proDesc: Kumpletong AI marketing tools kasama ang advanced automation.
upgrade.featCreativeStudio: Creative Studio — AI video, larawan, musika at boses
upgrade.featLinkTools: Link Tools — maikling link, rotator, tracking
upgrade.featContentCreator: Content Creator — social post, ad copy, video script

upgrade.featSuperPages: SuperPages — AI landing page at funnel

upgrade.featCourseCreator: Course Creator — gumawa at magbenta ng kurso (malapit na)
upgrade.featPrioritySupport: Priority support — mas mabilis na sagot

upgrade.annualProReferral: Taunang Pro referral = $175 instant na komisyon

visualiser.simulationDisclaimer: Simulation for educational purposes only. Actual earnings depend on personal activity and network performance. Income is not guaranteed.
visualiser.yourGridFills: Your grid fills from your entire network
visualiser.gridFillsDesc: Every person who joins anywhere in your downline fills a seat in your grid. Your direct referrals AND their referrals AND deeper — all the way down. One person, one seat, per advance.

campaignTiers.title: Mga Antas ng Kampanya
campaignTiers.subtitle: I-activate ang antas para mag-advertise ng video at kumita ng grid komisyon
campaignTiers.activateTiers: I-activate ang Antas. Kumita ng Komisyon.
campaignTiers.heroDesc: Bawat antas nagbibigay ng tunay na video views sa Manood para Kumita network. Kumikita ka ng komisyon habang napupuno ang grid ng 64 miyembro.
campaignTiers.howItWorksDesc: Bawat antas nagbibigay ng tunay na views. Kapag na-activate, inilalagay ka sa 8×8 grid na may 64 posisyon.
campaignTiers.renewalDesc: Nag-e-expire ang antas pagkatapos ma-deliver ang lahat ng views. I-activate lang ulit. Isang beses na USDT payment.
campaignTiers.videoViewsAcross: {{count}} video views sa mga kampanya mo
campaignTiers.earningsDisclaimer: Kita batay sa 5 personal na referral. Maaaring mag-iba ang kita.
